form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 352m at Q Lakeside beaten 18 lengths (21.25) behind Sunset Boy in a Maiden on April 15. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Lakeside (22.95) in a Maiden, finishing a 15 length seventh. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Has ability and can sneak into the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to give ground rounding the turn out of the back straight.
